titleStmt.title: SII 9.131: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 131. (A.R. No. 207 of 1913.) ON A STONE NEAR THE BASAVESVARA TEMPLE AT SINDIGERI, BELLARY TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is not dated but refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Traiḷōkyamalladēva. It mentions his Noḷamba feudatory Traiḷōkyamalla-Iṟivanoḷamba-Nārasiṅghadēva, who bore the title “lord of Kāñchīpura.” The latter's feudatory Maṇibētamahārāja of the Vaidumba family is stated to have granted 12 mattars of land for the charity of Paṭṭaṇa (the town) in Ballakunde three-hundred. The palaeography and the feudatory mentioned here would show that the record belongs to the reign of Sōmēśvara I.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastabhu
vanāśrayaṁ śrīpṛtvīvallabhaṁ mahā
rājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka
satyāśrayakuḷatiḷaka cāḷukyābharaṇa śrī
mattraiḷōkyamalladēvara vijaya
rājyābhivirddhipravartamānamācaṁdrā
rkatāraṁbaraṁ saltamire svastisamadhiga
tapaṁcamahāśabda pallavānvaya śrī
pṛtvīvallabhaṁ pallavakuḷatiḷakanēkavā
kyaṁ kāṁcipuraparamēśvara śrīmattraiḷōkya
malla Iṟivanoḷaṁba nārasiṅghadēva
ra datti svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda ma
hāmaṁḍaḷēśvarananēkasamarasaṁghaṭṭanōpala
bdhavijeyalakṣmīsamāliṁgitaviśāḷavakṣasthaḷaṁ
manujatriṇētraṁ sauryyanārāyaṇaṁ
lōkadoḷgaṇḍaṁ Aṣṭamahāsiddhi vaiduṁbābharaṇaṁ
śrīmaṇibītamahārājaru ballakuṁde mūnū
ṟaṟoḷagaṇa paṭṭaṇada dharmmētakke biṭṭa ma
ttaru panneraḍu lekkadoḷaṁ 12 I dharmmavanaḷi
dava bāṇarāsiyalkavileyanaḷidaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 9.131 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
